ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Hexagon Nutrition Limited has announced the resignation of both its Executive Director, Mr. Subhash Purushottam Kelkar, and Non-Executive Director, Mr. Aditya Kelkar, effective July 6, 2026. These departures are a direct consequence of their complete divestment of shareholding as selling shareholders in the company's recently concluded IPO, marking a significant transition in ownership and leadership. While this is presented as a planned exit post-IPO, the simultaneous resignation of two directors who have fully exited could impact institutional knowledge and future strategic direction, warranting careful observation of subsequent board appointments and company strategy.
